title: Senior Backend Engineer
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of backend engineering in Python and Go align very well with Honor's core requirements. The Senior Backend Engineer title matches your trajectory perfectly, and your proven experience designing relational data models, building distributed systems at scale (4M+ events/day), and working with AWS (ECS, SQS, S3) directly matches their tech stack. The role emphasizes service-oriented architecture and API design — both areas where you have strong production experience. The fully remote position with US-based company creates a significant timezone mismatch (Berlin is UTC+1/+2, US ranges 5–8 hours behind), but the posting explicitly mentions remote-first and uses national averages, suggesting genuine remote flexibility. Growth potential is solid: the roles span workforce optimization and growth systems (meaningful domain work), though the healthcare/aging-care context is not your stated industry preference. The lack of Kubernetes/advanced IaC requirements means no core tech gaps, though the absence of mention about observability or distributed system complexity is a minor gap.

red_flags: Timezone mismatch: Berlin (UTC+1/2) to US-based (typically UTC-5 to UTC-8) is 5–8 hours, exceeding your ±2h preference and approaching your skip threshold
Healthcare/aging care is not in your target industry list; growth potential is in domain unfamiliar to your background
No mention of observability, monitoring, or incident response emphasis; observability has been a strength you highlight
